top_signals.title: Podcast: Palantir to sue Sadiq Khan, GSK’s $10bn mega-deal, and could the World Cup rescue pubs?
top_signals.summary: In today’s episode of City AM’s Business As Usual podcast, we get stuck in the top stories of the day – from a major pharma M&A deal to a US software giant poised to take legal action against the Mayor of London. City Editor Simon Hunt gives his round up of major markets stories, as Pharma giant [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines urges China to remove structure in disputed shoal
top_signals.summary: Manila calls the structure "unauthorized and illegal," while Beijing says it has "indisputable sovereignty" over the shoal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: UK weakens proposed telecoms defenses against Chinese hackers after industry pushback
top_signals.summary: Britain has weakened proposed cybersecurity protections for its telecoms networks that were developed in response to the Salt Typhoon espionage campaign, after the companies responsible for implementing the measures lobbied against them.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
